title: pteris aquilina var. lanuginosa
intro: Pteris aquilina var. lanuginosa, also known as the soft brake fern, is a variety of the common brake fern (Pteris aquilina), a type of fern plant that belongs to the Pteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The soft brake fern has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, the soft brake fern is often used as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
